title: user_login_functionality
description: Verify that the user can successfully log in with valid credentials and receive a valid JWT token.

title: user_registration_process
description: Test the user registration endpoint to ensure a new user can register with company data and become the company OWNER.

title: jwt_token_refresh_flow
description: Validate the token refresh endpoint to ensure that expired JWT tokens can be securely refreshed and new tokens are issued.

title: create_new_user_with_role_access_control
description: Test creating a new user with appropriate role-based access control and verify the user is added to the company.

title: get_all_users_by_company
description: Verify that the API returns a list of users belonging only to the authenticated user's company.

title: delete_user_soft_deletion
description: Test the user deletion endpoint to ensure users are soft deleted and no longer accessible but data is retained.

title: create_product_inventory_management
description: Verify that a new product can be created with valid data and is correctly stored in the inventory.

title: search_products_functionality
description: Test the product search endpoint to ensure it returns accurate results based on search criteria.

title: create_sale_with_payment_integration
description: Validate the sales creation endpoint to ensure sales transactions are created atomically with payment processing.

title: create_payment_transactions
description: Test the payment creation endpoint to verify multiple payments can be created and linked to sales correctly.
